name: The Support Specialists
effect: Route all incoming issues through the appropriate ticketing system. This card is considered responsive.

clauses.name: TRIAGE CLAUSE
clauses.rule: When an issue is submitted: The issue is considered acknowledged.

clauses.name: ESCALATION OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If the issue persists beyond two sprints: Ownership is transferred to a different team.

clauses.name: RESOLUTION EFFECT
clauses.rule: When the ticket is closed: The issue is considered resolved regardless of status.

witness_quote: Have you tried clearing your cache?
